title: Shareables
description: Defines a list of items the mob wants to share or pick up. Items can be configured with optional parameters to control pickup, sharing, and inventory behavior.

all_items.title: All Items
all_items.description: A bucket for all other items in the game. Note this category is always least priority items.

all_items_max_amount.title: All Items Max Amount
all_items_max_amount.description: Maximum number of this item the mob will hold.

all_items_surplus_amount.title: All Items Surplus Amount
all_items_surplus_amount.description: Number of this item considered extra that the entity wants to share.

all_items_want_amount.title: All Items Want Amount
all_items_want_amount.description: Number of this item this entity wants to share.

items.title: Items
items.description:
List of items or item tags that the entity wants to share. Items in-game will match to this list from top to bottom, meaning that the first occurance of a match, be it name or tag, will shadow those coming after.

Sample values:
• bogged: [{"item":"minecraft:netherite_sword","priority"...

admire.title: Admire
admire.description: Mob will admire the item after picking up by looking at it. For this to happen the mob needs to have an Admire component and an Admire goal.

barter.title: Barter
barter.description: Mob will barter for the item after picking it up. For this to work the mob needs to have a Barter component and a Barter goal.

consume_item.title: Consume Item
consume_item.description: Determines whether the mob will consume the item or not.

craft_into.title: Craft Into
craft_into.description: Defines the item this entity wants to craft with the item defined by "item". Should be an item name.

item.title: Item
item.description: The name of the item. Aux value can be specified, for instance 'minecraft:skull:1'. Alternatively, a tag can be specified to match all items with that tag.

max_amount.title: Max Amount
max_amount.description: Maximum number of this item the mob will hold.

pickup_limit.title: Pickup Limit
pickup_limit.description: Maximum number items the mob will pick up during a single goal tick.

pickup_only.title: Pickup Only
pickup_only.description: Determines whether the mob can only pickup the item and not drop it.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Prioritizes which items the entity prefers. 0 is the highest priority.

stored_in_inventory.title: Stored In Inventory
stored_in_inventory.description: Determines whether the mob will try to put the item in its inventory if it has the inventory component and if it can't be equipped.

surplus_amount.title: Surplus Amount
surplus_amount.description: Number of this item considered extra that the entity wants to share.

want_amount.title: Want Amount
want_amount.description: Number of this item this entity wants to share.

singular_pickup.title: Singular Pickup
singular_pickup.description: Boolean value that controls if the mob is able to pick up more of the same item if it is already holding that item
